description_long: This is a single-family detached house set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading up to the main entrance. The house features a light-colored exterior with a prominent gable roof, accented by dark shingles and multiple dormer windows. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a walkway, while the backyard appears to have a patio or paved area. The structure includes a garage attached to one side, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern across the facade. The main entryway is marked by a small porch with steps and decorative columns. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements.
description: A light-colored, gable-roofed suburban house with a landscaped front yard, attached garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, landscaped yard, and driveway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, side yard, and part of the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, patio area, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and the driveway extending to the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and decorative columns
